sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Dai bang hong nawk ciangin ah,
A man hong en pah a, damna sung hong tunpih
A khasung zatui tawh tongdam nem hong luan

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong liah hong dal ding A mah hong kikham,
Topa kha nang kiang hong om tawntung,
Hehnem siampa Jesu'n A ang sung hong sung.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na thak khak khak tak ciang in,
Lungdam ko in Amah phat zaw in,
Nopsak theih na lungsim hong piaksa hi khin

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: It le ngaih te'n hong paisan hong nusiat ciang in,
Dah teng thuakpih nuam Jesu ilawm
hong theisiam mahmah a, Jesu ko peuh lecin
Khamuanna le nopna tui bang hong luang khawm.
